T0362.title: Hole-Card Peeking
T0362.definition: 在赌博作弊场景中，“透视”指黑产利用摄像设备、作弊软件或系统后门实时窥探对手底牌的技术手段。
T0362.description: Common methods include installing pinhole cameras at card tables or within gambling apps, modifying card sensors, or bribing platform operators to implant backdoors that transmit opponents' hands to the cheater's device. This allows the house or a card sharp to secure a win before bets are placed, rapidly draining victims in setups like pig-butchering scams or baccarat games. Discovery of such cheating often triggers violent confrontations or internal gang conflicts.
